name: get-it-done
description: Autonomous 5-agent team (Planner, Analyst, Executor, Validator + post-cycle Reflector) with a batch-aware dispatcher (/continue). v2 architecture complete: dispatcher owns all shared-state writes; sub-agents return structured `---agent-return---` YAML; tasks form an explicit DAG with milestones; EXECUTING batches heterogeneous (mix per-task / milestone validators + reworks + new executors), ANALYZING batches fan out one analyst per independent research request, all bounded by N=5; planner remains a singleton. Milestone validators gate downstream milestones on integration-level criteria. Stage 5: agent_rules seeded with v2-aware initial rules (PR-001..016, AR-001..005, ER-001..011, VR-001..006, RR-001..008).
